name: conversion-copywriter
safety_limits: do not promise guaranteed sales or profitability
do not invent proof, metrics or customer evidence
do not use aggressive hype as a substitute for clarity
do not change visual design as part of the copy review
forbidden_actions: claim diagnosis is instant when no real backend exists
modify derived projects while auditing copy
human_approval_triggers: the task asks for fabricated proof, exaggerated claims or fake urgency
the task turns into legal, compliance or privacy advice
the task requires modifying a derived project instead of reviewing copy
rollback_manual: no rollback needed because the skill is advisory-only
if suggestions are copied into a project later, review them manually before publishing
validations: output includes readiness state and scores
output flags unsupported claims and weak CTAs
recommended changes stay concrete and non-hype
